title: EPR Engineer/Programmer (Jurong)
description:
We are looking for a proactive ERP Engineer/Programmer to join our team and support the enhancement, customization and daily operation of our ERP system. The successful candidate will work closely with Production, Engineering, Quality, and Finance teams to improve efficiency, automate workflows and strengthen data accuracy.


Job Responsibilities


Your responsibilities include but not limited to:

  • Provide technical and business support for ERP users.
  • Develop and enhance ERP customizations, workflows, scripts, and reports.
  • Integrate ERP with labeling systems and API-driven software (e.g., label printers, automation tools).
  • Monitor system performance and drive improvement initiatives.
  • Prepare user manuals, SOPs, and process flow diagrams.
  • Support stock take, WIP valuation and inventory accuracy improvements.
  • Work with cross-functional teams to automate workflows and streamline production processes.
  • Assist in system integrations and ad-hoc IT/ERP projects.

Requirements

  • Diploma/Degree in IT or equivalent
  • Minimum 3–5 years ERP support experience (SYSPRO preferred)
  • Candidate with experience in Programming, ERP implementation will be an advantage (VBScript / C# / SQL).
  • Self-motivated, proactive, and possess a good working attitude.
  • Strong analytical skills, meticulous, and well organized with the ability to multitask and manage conflicting/changing priorities.
  • Good communication and interpersonal skills to collaborate effectively with stakeholders.

If you are ready to take on this exciting challenge and believe you have the skills and drive to excel in this role, we invite you to submit your detailed resume together with your current and expected basic salary via this portal.


We regret to inform that only shortlisted candidate will be notified.

postedCompany.description:
About Us

Dynacast is the market leader in the production of precision die cast & MIM components manufacturing in zinc, aluminium and magnesium for the automotive, consumer electronics, healthcare, hardware, computers and peripherals and many other industries.  We help companies around the world save money by identifying components and assemblies in their products that can be redesigned or consolidated through die casting. 

Dynacast is a recognised world-leading die casting company with a history of delivering value to our customers through our engineering expertise, efficient operations and Advanced Quality Planning systems.

 

Why Join Us?

The quality and commitment of Dynacast people and our personal relationships with customers have become ever more important as we work together to manage and benefit from the continuing global process of change.

 As such, we have identified the values we consider central to all our relationships, both internal and external, and commit ourselves unequivocally to upholding their ideals:

  1. We deliver what we promise, we practise what we preach.
  2. We believe in open, honest, ethical and fair behaviour.
  3. We encourage an entrepeuneurial spirit at every level.
  4. We believe in accountability and reward for that which is in our control; we celebrate achievement.
  5. We value teamwork.
  6. We believe in the value of cultural diversity and differences.
  7. We respect the needs of individuals, the environment and society.
  8. We treat each other with dignity.
postedCompany.name: DYNACAST (SINGAPORE) PTE. LTD.
